tickSpacing().details: Ticks can only be used at multiples of this value

returns.feeGrowthOutside0X128: Fee growth on the other side of the tick from the current tick in token0
returns.feeGrowthOutside1X128: Fee growth on the other side of the tick from the current tick in token1
returns.initialized: Set to true if the tick is initialized
returns.liquidityGross: The total amount of position liquidity that uses the pool either as tick lower or tick upper
returns.liquidityNet: How much liquidity changes when the pool price crosses the tick
returns.rewardGrowthOutsideX128: Reward growth on the other side of the tick
returns.secondsOutside: Seconds spent on the other side of the tick
returns.secondsPerLiquidityOutsideX128: Seconds spent per liquidity on the other side of the tick
returns.stakedLiquidityNet: How much staked liquidity changes when the pool price crosses the tick
returns.tickCumulativeOutside: The cumulative tick value on the other side of the tick

unstakedFee().details: Additional fee applied to unstaked liquidity

burn(int24,int24,uint128).notice: Burn liquidity from the sender and account tokens owed for the liquidity to the position

burn(int24,int24,uint128,address).notice: Burn liquidity for a specific owner (NFT manager variant)

collect(address,int24,int24,uint128,uint.notice: Collects tokens owed to a position
Collects tokens owed to a position (NFT manager variant)

factory().notice: The contract that deployed the pool

fee().notice: The pool's fee in hundredths of a bip, i.e. 1e-6

feeGrowthGlobal0X128().notice: The fee growth as a Q128.128 fees of token0 collected per unit of liquidity for the entire life of the pool

feeGrowthGlobal1X128().notice: The fee growth as a Q128.128 fees of token1 collected per unit of liquidity for the entire life of the pool

flash(address,uint256,uint256,bytes).notice: Receive token0 and/or token1 and pay it back, plus a fee, in the callback

gauge().notice: The gauge address associated with the pool

gaugeFees().notice: The amounts of token0 and token1 that are owed to the gauge

getRewardGrowthInside(int24,int24,uint25.notice: Returns data about reward growth within a tick range

increaseObservationCardinalityNext(uint1.notice: Increase the maximum number of price and liquidity observations

initialize(address,address,address,int24.notice: Sets the initial price for the pool

lastUpdated().notice: Last time the rewardReserve and rewardRate were updated

liquidity().notice: The currently in range liquidity available to the pool

maxLiquidityPerTick().notice: The maximum amount of position liquidity that can use any tick

mint(address,int24,int24,uint128,bytes).notice: Adds liquidity for the given recipient/tickLower/tickUpper position

observations(uint256).notice: Returns data about a specific observation index

observe(uint32[]).notice: Returns the cumulative tick and liquidity as of each timestamp `secondsAgo` from the current block timestamp

periodFinish().notice: Timestamp of the end of the current epoch's rewards

positions(bytes32).notice: Returns the information about a position by the position's key

rewardGrowthGlobalX128().notice: The reward growth as a Q128.128 rewards collected per unit of liquidity for the entire life of the pool

rewardRate().notice: The emission rate of time-based farming

rewardReserve().notice: Virtual reserve that holds information on how many rewards are yet to be distributed

rollover().notice: Tracks total rewards distributed when no staked liquidity in active tick

setGaugeAndPositionManager(address,addre.notice: Set gauge and position manager addresses

slot0().notice: The 0th storage slot in the pool stores many values

snapshotCumulativesInside(int24,int24).notice: Returns a snapshot of the tick cumulative, seconds per liquidity and seconds inside a tick range

stake(int128,int24,int24,bool).notice: Update staked liquidity for a position

stakedLiquidity().notice: The currently in range staked liquidity available to the pool

swap(address,bool,int256,uint160,bytes).notice: Swap token0 for token1, or token1 for token0

tickBitmap(int16).notice: Returns 256 packed tick initialized boolean values

ticks(int24).notice: Look up information about a specific tick in the pool

token0().notice: The first of the two tokens of the pool, sorted by address

token1().notice: The second of the two tokens of the pool, sorted by address

unstakedFee().notice: The pool's unstaked fee in hundredths of a bip, i.e. 1e-6
